headline: A Look At HCA Healthcare (HCA) Valuation After Hurricane‑Driven Profit Warning
summary: HCA Healthcare (HCA) recently warned that its full year profits are likely to come in at the lower end of prior guidance after Hurricanes Helene and Milton disrupted operations and pushed facility costs higher. See our latest analysis for HCA Healthcare. Despite the hurricane related warning, HCA Healthcare’s short term share price performance has been mixed, with a 3.45% 7 day share price return and a 1 month share price return of an 8.11% decline, while its 1 year total shareholder return...
